debug_info.goal:
x : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = (x - 1) * exp x + 1

proof:
have h (t : ℝ) (_ : t ∈ [[0, x]]) : HasDerivAt (fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t :=
    ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) |>.congr_deriv (by simp; ring)
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h]
  · simp
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable 0 x
successful_attempts:
have h (t : ℝ) (_ : t ∈ [[0, x]]) : HasDerivAt (fun t ↦ (t - 1) * exp t) (t * exp t) t :=
    ((hasDerivAt_id t).sub_const 1).mul (hasDerivAt_exp t) |>.congr_deriv (by simp; ring)
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h]
  · simp
  · exact (continuous_id.mul continuous_exp).intervalIntegrable 0 x
